lines.text: The Team and Access desk controls who can do what inside Nguzo.
Every user in the system is listed here, with their email, verification status, and role.
This is your security desk, so it's worth understanding the rules built into it.
You can change a user's role from this dropdown, granting or revoking their access in one move.
But notice the rule, admins and field force are internal roles, they can never be self-assigned.
That stops anyone signing up and quietly handing themselves control of the platform.
And the super-admin account is locked, so no one, not even another admin, can downgrade the owner.
This is how Nguzo stays secure, access is granted deliberately, never by accident.
